presentation.intro_text: Specialized in designing and deploying end-to-end architectures for startups and corporate environments. My approach combines the rigor of Computer Engineering with the technical ability to implement high-performance APIs, data processing systems, and high-availability architectures.
presentation.intro_b1: Backend & Architecture: Resilient API design, strict validation, and optimized data models.
presentation.intro_b2: Functional Interfaces: Modern frontend development focused on efficiency and user experience.
presentation.intro_b3: Engineering Quality: Clean code, exhaustive technical documentation, and automated deployment.

scraper-precios.title: Price Scraper
scraper-precios.subtitle: API that compares supermarket prices
scraper-precios.description: Automated data extraction system to monitor price fluctuations in real-time. Designed to optimize search processes and large-scale data analysis.

portfolio.title: Portfolio
portfolio.subtitle: This portfolio
portfolio.description: This platform: my professional introduction. Built with React and Chakra UI, implementing internationalization (i18n) and smooth animations for superior UX.

real-time-chat.title: Real-Time Chat
real-time-chat.subtitle: Real-time messaging application
real-time-chat.description: Scalable instant messaging app with multi-room support and secure authentication. A case study in full-duplex communication and real-time state management.

ink-ai-risk-detector.title: Ink | AI Risk Detector
ink-ai-risk-detector.subtitle: Smart Contract risk detector
ink-ai-risk-detector.description: Analyzes smart contract addresses and returns a score based on an AI analysis that evaluates over 10 risk criteria.

e-commerce.title: E-commerce
e-commerce.subtitle: Full online store
e-commerce.description: Online store featuring a shopping cart, product management, and admin panel. Coderhouse final project.

fintrack.title: FinTrack
fintrack.subtitle: Personal finance manager
fintrack.description: A manager that simplifies the tracking and handling of personal finances. It allows for the creation of savings plans and strategies.

vitistrust.title: VitisTrust
vitistrust.subtitle: Certification oracle for tokenized vineyards
vitistrust.description: Monitors vineyards via satellite to validate their existence and current health. It offers a certification to guarantee the validity of a tokenized vineyard.

about.heading: Building efficient and scalable solutions.
about.context: Professional background, technical focus, and what I can bring to your team.
about.p1: I am a Software Developer with a solid foundation in Computer Engineering and a comprehensive focus on Backend development. My goal is not just to write code, but to design efficient, scalable, and maintainable systems, combining the agility of modern development with rigorous software engineering principles.
about.p2: Committed to continuous learning, my vision focuses on understanding the technical fundamentals and the 'why' behind every architectural decision, prioritizing software quality over immediacy.

card1.title: Blockchain & Web3 Ecosystem
card1.text: Knowledge in blockchain architecture and decentralized applications. Experience with Web3 development languages such as Solidity and Rust. Passionate about this ecosystem, I stay in constant motion and continuous learning.

card2.title: Community
card2.text: Staff member at SaltaDev. Constantly working with the local developer community to foster talent and knowledge within the province. A firm believer in networking, coworking, and community-driven growth.

card3.title: AI Solutions
card3.text: Development and implementation of AI agents and architectures focused on process automation, seeking to optimize operational efficiency through intelligent solutions.
